overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit urban plaza at night, passing under a large red '2ND AMENDMENT' sign, then entering an indoor gym with green fluorescent lighting where various NPCs are working out with weights and exercise equipment.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit urban plaza with weapon shop sign

events.description: exits building doorway into open urban plaza with red neon lighting
turns slightly right toward the gym entrance while walking

agents.ego_description: walking through the red-lit plaza toward the gym entrance, passing under the large neon sign

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking across the plaza toward the right
person in red jacket standing near the wall

entered.detail: large red neon sign with gun icon and text '2ND AMENDMENT' mounted above the plaza
red illuminated exit sign above the doorway
twin screens displaying a person with purple hair against a blue background
smooth concrete plaza surface with scattered debris
tall chain-link fence running along the left side of the plaza

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a building looking out into a red-lit urban plaza. The camera exits into the plaza, revealing a large neon '2ND AMENDMENT' sign overhead. Various NPCs are scattered throughout the concrete plaza, walking or standing around. The atmosphere is dark and cyberpunk with dominant red neon lighting reflecting off the wet ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: entrance corridor to indoor gym facility

events.description: enters the gym building from the outdoor plaza, passing through the entrance archway
ambient lighting shifts dramatically from red neon to green fluorescent as camera moves deeper inside

agents.ego_description: walking through the gym entrance as the environment transitions from outdoor plaza to indoor facility

notable_agents.action: person in white top and dark pants walking ahead into the gym interior
person in red jacket standing near weight equipment racks

entered.detail: large industrial entrance leading from plaza into the gym facility
rows of green-tinted fluorescent tubes illuminating the interior ceiling
metal racks holding various weight plates and barbells
industrial chain-link fencing partitioning sections of the entrance area
thick concrete support pillars with yellow and black hazard stripes

segments.scene_description: The character enters the gym facility, transitioning from the red-lit outdoor plaza to an indoor space illuminated by green fluorescent lights. The entrance area features chain-link fencing, industrial pillars, and weight equipment racks. NPCs are seen walking deeper into the facility as the camera follows the path inside.

scene_state.functional_zone: open gym floor with weightlifting stations

events.description: enters main gym floor area with visible weightlifting platforms and exercise equipment
slows down while navigating between weight racks and exercise benches

agents.ego_description: walking through the gym floor observing various NPCs working out with weights and equipment

notable_agents.action: muscular person in tank top walking toward weight rack in the center area
person using weight machine near the chain-link fence partition

entered.detail: raised concrete platform for weightlifting exercises with yellow border markings
racks holding multiple barbells and weight plates for training
flat and incline weight benches scattered throughout the gym floor
long green fluorescent tubes mounted on the ceiling providing ambient lighting

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the gym, the camera reveals weightlifting platforms, barbell racks, and exercise benches under green fluorescent lighting. Various NPCs are working out or walking through the space. The floor features a distinctive grid pattern, and chain-link partitions divide sections of the gym. The atmosphere is industrial and gritty.

scene_state.functional_zone: weight training area with benches and lockers

events.description: approaches weightlifter performing heavy barbell shoulder presses in the training area
turns left to move past the weight station and continues deeper into the gym

agents.ego_description: slowing down to observe a weightlifter performing barbell presses, then continuing past the training station

notable_agents.action: muscular individual performing barbell shoulder presses with heavy weights, wearing white tank top
person in gold outfit standing near the locker cabinets observing the gym

entered.detail: tall metal locker cabinets lining the left wall for gym members
heavy punching bag hanging from the ceiling for boxing training
vertical rack holding multiple circular weight plates of various sizes
dedicated bench press station with barbell and safety racks

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a weightlifter performing heavy barbell shoulder presses in the deeper gym area. Lockers line the left wall, and various weight training equipment including a punching bag and weight plate tree fill the space. The lighting remains green and atmospheric. After observing the weightlifter, the camera continues past toward the locker area and deeper into the facility.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a red-lit urban plaza into the gritty, green-hued interior of an industrial gym. It begins inside a building and moves outward into a dark cyberpunk plaza, where a massive neon 2ND AMENDMENT sign casts a red glow over the wet concrete and scattered pedestrians. As the camera follows the character, the scene shifts from the outdoor red lighting into an indoor facility defined by green fluorescent lights, chain-link fencing, and industrial pillars. The camera then pushes deeper into the gym, passing weightlifting platforms and grid-patterned floors before approaching a weightlifter performing shoulder presses. Finally, the movement continues past punching bags and weight plate trees toward a row of lockers at the far end of the facility.
